channel.title: For Authors :: IEEE International Conference
channel.description: For AuthorsSubmission timeline, paper formatting, and review process. Submit your paper Important Dates Event Date Special Session Proposal Deadline 30 Sep 2025 ✓ Done Special Session Proposal Acceptance 15 Oct 2025 ✓ Done Paper Submission Deadline 30 Apr 2026 Next Paper Acceptance Notification 15 May 2026 Final Manuscript Submission Deadline 01 Jun 2026 Author Registration Deadline 15 Jun 2026 Call for Papers The upcoming IEEE International Conference will be held in early 2025. As a prominent biennial conference sponsored by the IEEE Industrial Electronics Society, this event will gather the international community to present the latest research, share new ideas and engineering breakthroughs, and discuss current challenges and future directions in the field.
